faqs.q1: How long does it take to get a response?
faqs.a1: We typically respond within 24 hours during business days.
faqs.a2: Yes! Include your preferred time in the message and we'll arrange a call.
faqs.q3: Do you offer live chat support?
faqs.a3: Live chat is available for enrolled students from 9 AM to 6 PM IST.

about.title: About Gradify
about.subtitle: Gradify is an AI-powered learning and progress tracking platform designed to help students learn smarter, track performance, and achieve academic excellence.
about.missionDesc: To simplify and enhance the learning experience through structured course management, real-time progress tracking, and intelligent AI assistance.
about.visionDesc: To create a next-generation digital learning ecosystem where students receive personalized insights and institutions gain meaningful academic analytics.
about.feature1Desc: Our AI tutor understands course modules and student progress to provide relevant guidance.
about.feature2Desc: Modular course design with lessons, assignments, quizzes, and real-time updates.
about.feature3Desc: Dashboard insights including streaks, analytics, attendance, and skill tracking.

coreValues.title: Our Core Values
coreValues.subtitle: These principles guide everything we do at Gradify

studentCentric.title: Student-Centric
studentCentric.desc: Every decision we make prioritizes student success and learning experience.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We continuously evolve our platform with cutting-edge technology and pedagogy.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: We maintain the highest standards in content, instruction, and support.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: We strive for excellence in everything we do, from courses to customer service.

founded.title: Founded

first1000.title: First 1000 Students

about.techSubtitle: Built with modern technologies for optimal performance and scalability

landing.heroSubtitle: Gradify combines structured LMS workflows, real-time analytics, and an AI tutor to help students learn faster and institutions run smarter.
landing.featuresTitle: Purpose-built for institutions that care about outcomes
landing.featuresSubtitle: From course delivery to placement readiness, Gradify unifies every core academic workflow in a clean, scalable interface.
landing.rolesTitle: Designed for students, instructors, and admins
landing.rolesSubtitle: Every workflow is optimized for the role using it, so teams move faster with less friction and better clarity.
landing.rolesPoint1: Students receive clear next steps and personalized support.
landing.rolesPoint2: Instructors monitor class health and intervene early.
landing.rolesPoint3: Admins get institute-level visibility and control.

learningPaths.title: Learning Paths
learningPaths.desc: Curriculum-first modules with assignments and quizzes designed for measurable outcomes.

liveAnalytics.title: Live Analytics
liveAnalytics.desc: Track attendance, grades, skill growth, and learning velocity from one dashboard.

aiTutor.title: AI Tutor
aiTutor.desc: Context-aware support for doubts, revision planning, and personalized recommendations.

careerLayer.title: Career Layer
careerLayer.desc: Jobs, alumni opportunities, and application workflows integrated into the platform.

unifiedCommunication.title: Unified Communication
unifiedCommunication.desc: In-platform conversations, updates, and nudges that keep everyone aligned.

roleBasedAccess.title: Role-based Access
roleBasedAccess.desc: Secure admin, instructor, and student workflows with controlled visibility and actions.

createStructuredCourses.title: Create structured courses
createStructuredCourses.desc: Design modules, lessons, assignments, and quizzes with clear progression.

trackLearnerMomentum.title: Track learner momentum
trackLearnerMomentum.desc: Monitor completion, attendance trends, and performance signals in real time.

improveWithInsights.title: Improve with insights
improveWithInsights.desc: Use AI and analytics to close gaps and improve outcomes continuously.

aman.text: Gradify gave our institute a clean and scalable digital learning workflow in weeks.

sneha.text: The AI tutor and progress analytics improved student confidence and class performance.

rohit.text: I finally know what to study next every day. The dashboard keeps me focused.

q1.a: Gradify is built for institutes and training teams managing students, instructors, and outcomes at scale.

q2.q: Does it support both academic and career growth?
q2.a: Yes. Alongside LMS workflows, Gradify includes alumni and job modules to support career readiness.

q3.a: Yes. The built-in AI tutor provides instant, context-aware guidance and learning suggestions.

hero.title: Terms and Conditions
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using Gradify's services

termsPage.introduction: Welcome to Gradify. By accessing or using our Learning Management System (LMS), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access our services.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.paragraph1: By creating an account or using Gradify's services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions, as well as our Privacy Policy. These terms apply to all users of the platform, including students, instructors, and administrators.
section1.bullet1: • You must be at least 18 years old to use our services independently
section1.bullet2: • Users under 18 must have parental or guardian consent
section1.bullet3: • You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration
section1.bullet4: • You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials

section2.title: 2. Use License
section2.paragraph1: Gradify grants you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable, limited license to access and use our platform and course materials for your personal educational purposes only.
section2.youMay1: ✓ Access and view course content enrolled in
section2.youMay2: ✓ Download materials explicitly marked as downloadable
section2.youMayNot1: ✗ Share your account credentials with others
section2.youMayNot2: ✗ Reproduce, distribute, or sell course materials
section2.youMayNot3: ✗ Use automated tools to scrape content
section2.youMayNot4: ✗ Modify or create derivative works from our content

section3.title: 3. User Account
section3.paragraph1: To access most features of Gradify, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and password.
section3.responsibility1: • Use a strong, unique password for your account
section3.responsibility2: • Do not share your login credentials with anyone
section3.responsibility3: • Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
section3.responsibility4: • Update your information to keep it accurate and current
section3.responsibility5: • You are liable for all activities conducted through your account
section3.terminationText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms, engage in fraudulent activities, or for any other reason at our discretion. You may also request account deletion by contacting our support team.

section4.title: 4. Course Access and Content
section4.paragraph1: When you enroll in a course, you gain access to the course materials for the duration specified in the course details. Course access is subject to the following conditions:
section4.availabilityText: Course content is typically available for lifetime access unless otherwise specified. We reserve the right to update or modify content.
section4.certificatesText: Certificates are issued upon successful completion of course requirements and assessments as defined by the instructor.
section4.qualityText: While we strive to provide high-quality educational content, we do not guarantee that all courses will meet your expectations or that the information is always current and accurate.

section5.title: 5. Payment and Refunds
section5.paragraph1: Certain courses and features on Gradify require payment. All prices are in USD unless otherwise stated and are subject to change without notice.
section5.paymentTerm1: • All payments are processed securely through our payment partners
section5.paymentTerm2: • You must provide accurate billing information
section5.paymentTerm3: • Subscription fees are billed in advance
section5.paymentTerm4: • Prices are subject to applicable taxes
section5.refundPolicyText: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for most courses. To request a refund, you must:
section5.refundCondition1: • Request the refund within 30 days of purchase
section5.refundCondition2: • Have completed less than 30% of the course
section5.refundCondition3: • Provide a valid reason for the refund request
section5.refundNote: Refunds are processed within 7-10 business days. Some courses may have different refund policies as specified in the course description.

section6.title: 6. Intellectual Property Rights
section6.paragraph1: All content, features, and functionality on Gradify, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, videos, software, and course materials, are the exclusive property of Gradify or its content suppliers and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
section6.courseContentText: Instructors retain ownership of their original course content. By uploading content to Gradify, instructors grant us a license to host, display, and distribute their content on our platform.
section6.userContentText: By posting comments, questions, or other content on our platform, you grant Gradify a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, and display such content.

section7.title: 7. Prohibited Activities
section7.paragraph1: You are prohibited from using Gradify for any unlawful purpose or in any way that could:
section7.prohibited1: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
section7.prohibited2: Infringe upon the rights of others
section7.prohibited3: Harass, abuse, or harm other users
section7.prohibited5: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
section7.prohibited6: Engage in any form of automated data collection
section7.prohibited10: Use the platform for commercial purposes without authorization
section7.warningText: Violation of these prohibitions may result in immediate account termination and legal action.

section8.title: 8. Disclaimer
section8.paragraph1: THE SERVICES AND CONTENT ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT ANY WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED.
section8.warrant1: • The services will be uninterrupted or error-free
section8.warrant3: • The platform is free of viruses or harmful components
section8.warrant4: • The results from using our services will meet your requirements
section8.warrant5: • Course content is always accurate, complete, or current
section8.paragraph3: You use Gradify at your own risk. We are not responsible for any educational outcomes, career advancement, or other results you may or may not achieve through our platform.

section9.title: 9. Limitations of Liability
section9.paragraph1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, GRADIFY SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY.
section9.limitation4: • Any damages resulting from your use or inability to use our services
section9.limitation5: • Unauthorized access to or alteration of your content
section9.maxLiabilityText: Our total liability to you for any claims arising from your use of Gradify shall not exceed the amount you paid to us in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

section10.title: 10. Privacy Policy
section10.paragraph1: Your privacy is important to us. Our Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. By using Gradify, you consent to our privacy practices as described in our Privacy Policy.
section10.dataSecurityText: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your data
section10.dataUsageText: We only use your data to improve your learning experience
section10.yourRightsText: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your data

section11.title: 11. Changes to Terms
section11.paragraph1: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms and Conditions at any time at our sole discretion. We will provide notice of any material changes by:
section11.notification1: • Posting the updated terms on this page
section11.notification2: • Updating the "Last Updated" date at the top
section11.notification3: • Sending email notifications to registered users (for significant changes)
section11.responsibilityText: It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of Gradify after any changes constitutes acceptance of those changes.
section11.paragraph2: If you do not agree to the modified terms, you must stop using our services and may request account deletion.

section12.title: 12. Contact Us
section12.paragraph1: If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us:
section12.address:
Gradify Inc.
123 Education Street
San Francisco, CA 94102
United States
section12.responseTimeText: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24-48 hours.

footer.thankYouText: By using Gradify, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
